expected_outcome: Competent database engineer skilled in structuring NoSQL document structures, writing query filters, compiling aggregation pipelines, and configuring indexes.

phases.practice_schedule: 1 Hour daily writing database queries and updating document parameters via Mongo Shell.

mini_project.title: Inventory Shell Scripting
mini_project.description: Create a database collection for products, insert elements, run category updates, and clear obsolete stocks.

phases.milestone: Mastered document schema concepts, basic search filters, nested structures updates, and deletion filters.

phases.practice_schedule: 1.5 Hours daily building complex indexes and measuring query speed improvements.

mini_project.title: User Profile & Post Database Model
mini_project.description: Establish collections for Users and Posts, configuring indexes on usernames and tags arrays for fast retrieval.

phases.milestone: Proficient in designing document relations, generating compound indexes, and evaluating query search costs.

phases.practice_schedule: 2 Hours daily writing aggregate pipe groups and executing collections data maps.

mini_project.title: Sales Report Dashboard Engine
mini_project.description: Build an aggregation query that calculates total sales per store, filters dates range, sorts results, and averages values.

phases.milestone: Capable of compiling multi-stage aggregation pipelines, unwinding data arrays, and connecting databases to backend scripts.

major_projects.title: Social Network Database Architecture
